name: Dida365 MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Dida365 (滴答清单) — a popular Chinese task management and to-do app (also known as TickTick in international markets). Enables AI agents to create, read, update, and complete tasks, manage projects, set reminders, and interact with Dida365's task management features — supporting AI-driven personal and team productivity workflows.
use_cases: Creating and managing tasks in Dida365 from AI productivity agents
Querying task lists and project status from planning agents
Setting reminders and deadlines from workflow automation agents
Integrating Dida365 task data into AI-driven productivity workflows
not_for: Teams using other task managers (Todoist, Things, Asana) without Dida365
Enterprise project management requiring advanced PM features
Teams primarily using TickTick (international version) — verify API compatibility
best_when: A Dida365/TickTick user wants AI agents to manage their task list — creating tasks, checking completion, and maintaining their personal productivity workflow through the Dida365 API.
avoid_when: You use Todoist, Things, or another task manager. Community tool — not official Dida365/TickTick integration. Verify Dida365 API terms before production deployment.

auth.notes: Dida365/TickTick API credentials required. OAuth or API token from Dida365 developer platform.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Dida365 free tier with limited features; premium for advanced features
pricing.notes: Dida365 is free with premium plans. MCP server is free open source community tool.

known_agent_gotchas: Dida365 and TickTick may have different API endpoints — verify which version you're targeting
CN data residency for Dida365 (Chinese market) vs US for TickTick — data sovereignty considerations
Community tool — not official Benbiu/TickTick integration
OAuth token refresh needed for long-running agents — implement proper token lifecycle management
agent_readiness.security_notes: Task data includes personal productivity information. OAuth credentials. HTTPS. CN/US data residency depending on Dida365 vs TickTick.

security_score_components.security_notes: OAuth auth. HTTPS. Task data stays on Dida365/TickTick servers. CN/US data residency.
